M5G M5G_APP_DRESSINGS (M5G) Application of Dressings CHAR 1 Skin condition: skin treatments in last 7 days - application of dressings. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
429 M5H M5H_APP_MEDS (M5H) Application of Ointments/Medications CHAR 1 Skin condition: skin treatments in last 7 days - application of ointments/medications other than to feet. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
